Parag Parikh Mutual Fund (Also known as PPFAS Mutual Fund)

PPFAS Asset Management Private Ltd. manages Parag Parikh Mutual Fund, established in 2012 by Late Parag Parikh. Also known as PPFAS Mutual Fund, has a stand-out and unique approach towards managing funds.

They manage a total of 5 mutual fund schemes, including 2 equity, 1 debt, and 3 hybrid schemes. As of 2024, the AUM of Parag Parikh Mutual Fund is Rs. 62207 crore. The AMC's key people include Neil Parag Parikh, the Chairman and CEO, and Rajeev Thakkar, the Chief Information Officer (CIO) and Equity Fund Manager. The asset management company chose a tortoise named Professor Tortoise or ProTo as its logo because it represents wisdom and experience, which aligns with their investing philosophy.

Parag Parikh (PPFAS) Mutual Funds

After you have understood the details about Parag Parikh Mutual Fund, it is time for you to start your investment process with INDmoney. Below are some simple steps to follow to start your mutual fund's investment journey with us.
Step 2: Once your Free investment account is ready, you can either search for Parag Parikh Mutual Fund or go to the mutual fund section.
Step 3: Choose any Parag Parikh Mutual Fund by looking at aspects like past returns, volatility, downside capture ratio, AUM, Expense ratios and underlying stocks and sectors.

Step 4: You can choose to set up SIP in any Parag Parikh Mutual Fund or even invest as a lump sum. Once you are on the individual Parag Parikh Mutual Fund page, click "One-time" for lump sum investment or "SIP" for a systematic investment plan.

Step 6: Set up payments. If you choose to set up SIP in any Parag Parikh Mutual Fund, you can do a free automatic pay set-up via bank mandate or UPI. If you choose to invest in a lump sum (one-time) then you can pay via UPI, net banking, NEFT or RTGS.
